title: Add synchronized_hop_channel method to SimNode or Simulation using hop_schedule and current SFN/time
description: Implement computation of current hop channel from node's hop_schedule tuple for CCP-12. Match test vectors in ccp16-hop.json. Use independent oracle. No dead code. Reference spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md
